title: Diversity of Life: Ecology & Zoo Simulation
description: A mod that give you the real experience of touching with animals, plants, etc.
body:
![DOL logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97e064a19a94907a2943af1cfc4ed69267c009f3.png)
![Civet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e8f584d9719388d10ef35ed472b0ae0c890de50_0.webp)
**_ABOUT DIVERSITY OF LIFE_**
Diversity of Life is a project that is a sequel to Zoological Mod (formerly "Zoobox"), which plans to add many real animals (with accurate appearances, behaviors, reproductive, and diets) running around in your world that will probably never fail to amaze you, and you can even take care of these, too! We will also add non-generic plants & others that have a care system similar to that of animals. Inspired by Tycoon Zoo 2, Planet Zoo, and other Minecraft mods (ZAWA, Untamed Wilds, Fossils and Archeology: Revival, etc.)

**[KO-FI | DONATE]**

(https://ko-fi.com/diversityoflife)


I will appreciate it a lot, please! It always goes to the coders/scripters, including DarkBlade, who worked hard!**


**VERISON**

Currently 1.20.1 only, sorry to 1.21, 1.22, 1.12, and 1.16 players



**WIKI**

BANDED PALM CIVET (The first and only animal)

The banded palm civet is a small nocturnal mammal native to Southeast Asia and is currently a near-threatened species according to the IUCN.

- You can tame these with any meat & others (that match their diet)

- They increase their enrichment through the dig box & logs



**DIG BOX**

Dig box is a popular toy for infamous animals like rabbits, ferrets, hamsters, and more

- You can put the stick in there only (for now)



**BOWL**

Bowl is clean, something for animals to eat & drink

- You can add fruits, meats, green plants, and more to it; it will change its appearance

- You can add a water bottle to it only to make it a water bowl



**TRAINING STICK**

A training stick (AKA Lollipop target) is a way to control an animal, commonly used in zoos

- You can make most animals sit, wander, and follow with that training stick



**CLEANING BRUSH**

 A cleaning brush is something you do to clean animals so they won't be smelly and catch diseases anymore



**ANIMAL DATA CARD**

 You use the card to check an animal's health & identify



**GAUZE BANDAGE**

 You can heal an animal faster (Giving it one HP a second for 30 seconds)



**NURSER BOTTLE**

 You can take care of a newborn animal without its mom



**WORM…**

 BLAH BLAH BLAH do I need to say more?
